input.headline: Remote telescope farm helps far away stargazers beat light pollution

raw.headline: Remote telescope farm helps far away stargazers beat light pollution

winner: The remote telescope farm offers "dark sky packages," so you can finally see if that distant star is actually just a misplaced streetlight from your ex's apartment complex.

candidates.text: Why did the astronomer bring a ladder to the remote telescope farm? Because he heard the light pollution was *out of this world*—and he wanted to reach new heights!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'out of this world' and 'reach new heights' are clever and specific to the context, with natural wordplay and concise delivery."}

candidates.text: I tried using a remote telescope farm to beat light pollution, but all I got was a bad connection and my ex.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, surprising, and ties the headline to a personal, relatable twist with a touch of humor."}

candidates.text: The remote telescope farm offers "dark sky packages," so you can finally see if that distant star is actually just a misplaced streetlight from your ex's apartment complex.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with a specific, relatable scenario that ties the telescope farm to personal life, enhancing humor through unexpected connection."}

candidates.text: We installed a telescope farm in the middle of nowhere so city folks could finally see stars without their view being ruined by, you know, like, *everything*.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat funny with the use of 'everything' for emphasis, but it's a bit generic and lacks the surprise or specificity that would make it stand out in a humor competition."}

candidates.text: Why did the astronomer break up with his girlfriend? Because she said he was always so *light* on our relationship!
